channel.title: PVPWire (full feed)
channel.description: PVPWire news and esports tournament calendar.

item.title: ALGS 2026 Championship
item.description: Apex Legends Global Series year-end finals. The defining BR esports calendar event.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: VCT Champions 2026
item.description: Valorant year-end championship across VCT Americas, EMEA, Pacific, and China. The Valorant calendar's defining event.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: League of Legends World Championship 2026
item.description: League of Legends Worlds 2026. October to November tentpole. Single most-watched esports event of the year by viewership.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: The International 2026
item.description: Dota 2's annual flagship event. October 2026, host city to be confirmed. The defining event of the Dota 2 competitive year.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: RLCS 2026 World Championship
item.description: Annual Rocket League year-end championship. Tier 1, international, August. The genre-defining Rocket League event.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: EVO 2026
item.description: Annual fighting-game championship across Street Fighter 6, Tekken 8, Guilty Gear Strive, Mortal Kombat 1, and rotating titles. Las Vegas, August.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: Esports World Cup 2026
item.description: Multi-game cross-disciplinary tournament with $60M+ aggregate prize pool. Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Saudi-funded; politically contentious.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: ESL Pro League Season 22
item.description: ESL Pro League Season 22, the spring half of the year's main CS league competition. Stockholm studio.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: Field notes: the lonely shifts
item.description: Some servers had a tempo that only made sense at three in the morning. There were rooms in those games that nobody was supposed to find, and a few of us did anyway.
item.author: Og

item.title: VCT Masters Spring 2026
item.description: Mid-season Valorant tentpole between regional VCT splits and VCT Champions. April or May, host city TBC.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: Throne and Liberty has the bones. The publisher does not.
item.description: The siege loop is the best a Korean MMO has shipped in a decade. The monetization layer is what will kill it. Two facts that the audience keeps trying to soften into one.
item.author: Flosium

item.title: Reward asymmetry has to favor the loser, or the population bleeds
item.description: Every full-loot system that survived the late nineties learned this. The current extraction shooter wave is repeating mistakes the older genre already paid for, and most of the surviving examples already wrote down the answer.
item.author: Flosium

item.title: CS2 Spring Major 2026
item.description: Spring CS Major 2026. The first Major of the calendar year and one of the two flagship CS events of the season. Operator and host city to be confirmed.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: Six Invitational 2026
item.description: Annual Rainbow Six Siege year-opener and the genre's defining event. February in Sao Paulo, Brazil. $3M+ prize pool.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: Champions Chess Tour 2026
item.description: Multi-event chess season run by Chess.com across the calendar year. Magnus Carlsen and the world top 10 in Division I.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial

item.title: IEM Katowice 2026
item.description: First major CS2 event of 2026. Spodek Arena, Katowice, Poland. The traditional CS year-opener and one of the most prestigious non-Major CS events.
item.author: PVPWire Editorial
